blueprint.title: Google Search Blueprint

adrise.title: AdRise™ Campaign Wizard
adrise.subtitle: Create and optimize your advertising campaigns with AI intelligence.

fields.sessionNameTooltip: A name to identify this planning session in your dashboard.
fields.industryTooltip: Your business sector (e.g., Real Estate, Retail). This helps us calibrate cost benchmarks.
fields.offerTooltip: The specific product, service, or deal you want to promote.
fields.goalTooltip: Your primary objective for this campaign (e.g., getting leads or making sales).
fields.budgetMonthlyTooltip: The total amount you plan to spend across all channels in a month.
fields.locationsTooltip: The cities, regions, or countries where you want your ads to appear.
fields.brandToneTooltip: The personality and voice of your brand (e.g., Professional, Playful).
fields.competitorsTooltip: List your main competitors to help us analyze their strategies.
fields.audienceNotesTooltip: Any specific details about who you want to reach (e.g., age, interests).
fields.seasonalityTooltip: Choose if your business has predictable spikes in demand.
fields.pacingTooltip: How you want to distribute your budget over the campaign period.
fields.seasonalityStartTooltip: The date when your seasonal peak or promotion begins.
fields.seasonalityEndTooltip: The date when your seasonal peak or promotion ends.
fields.promoWindowTooltip: The total duration of your promotion in days. This is automatically calculated from your start and end dates.
fields.geoRadiusTooltip: The distance around your target locations to reach potential customers.
fields.landingPageTooltip: The website address where your ads will point to (e.g., https://yourbrand.com/offer).
fields.campaignTimelineTooltip: The planned duration for your advertising campaign.
fields.statusTooltip: The current state of your campaign planning session.

offer.title: What are you offering?
offer.description: Describe your product or service in detail.
offer.placeholder: e.g. We offer premium organic coffee beans delivered to your doorstep...
offer.audiencePlaceholder: Describe your target audience (interests, demographics, pain points)...
offer.smartFillTooltip: Let AI scan your landing page to extract current offers automatically.

objectives.awarenessSubtitle: Reach more people and build brand recognition
objectives.leadsSubtitle: Collect contact info from potential customers
objectives.salesSubtitle: Drive direct product or service purchases
objectives.trafficSubtitle: Get more people to visit your landing page

budget.title: Campaign Budget
budget.minWarning: A minimum budget of $500 is recommended for best results.
budget.seasonalityHolidayDesc: Higher demand during Christmas and New Year period.
budget.seasonalityBlackFridayDesc: Intense short-term peak for November shopping events.
budget.lowBudgetWarning: Your budget might be too low for a multi-channel strategy. Consider focusing on a single channel.
budget.pacingEvenDesc: Distribute budget equally across all days.
budget.pacingFrontLoadDesc: Spend more at the beginning to capture early demand.
budget.pacingRampUpDesc: Start slow and increase spending towards the peak.
budget.rationaleText: Based on your {goal} goal, we've designed a plan that focuses on {pacing}. This ensures your budget is used most effectively to drive the results you need.
budget.assumptionBudget: Budget is sufficient to maintain visibility across multiple channels throughout the month.
budget.assumptionEfficiency: With this budget, we will prioritize high-efficiency placements to maximize your return.
budget.assumptionCPC: Assumed average costs are based on standard benchmarks for the {industry} industry.
budget.assumptionSeasonality: Spending intensity is adjusted to account for {seasonality} trends.
budget.curveRampUp: Spending will gradually increase starting {start}, peaking over the {window}-day window.
budget.curveRampDown: High initial spending will gradually decrease toward {end} to capture early intent.
budget.curveEven: Spending will remain consistent throughout the entire campaign duration.
budget.tradeoffLowBudget: Limited reach: We will focus on the most likely converters rather than broad awareness.
budget.tradeoffAwareness: Long-term play: You may see lower immediate sales as we build brand recognition.
budget.tradeoffConversion: Higher cost-per-result: Focusing on bottom-funnel sales typically costs more than general traffic.

autoReply.title: AI Auto-Reply System
autoReply.description: When enabled, our AI will automatically respond to reviews based on your configuration, using your brand voice and tone.
autoReply.rulesSubtitle: Define which reviews should trigger an automatic response
autoReply.sentimentTooltip: Choose which rating levels should receive automated replies
autoReply.positiveOnlyDesc: Best for businesses wanting to only automate high-praise reviews.
autoReply.positiveNeutralDesc: Comprehensive coverage including 3-star reviews for maximum efficiency.
autoReply.negativeSafeguardDesc: Always hold 1 & 2 star reviews for manual approval before posting.
autoReply.timingSubtitle: Control when and how often replies are sent
autoReply.delayDesc: Wait time to make AI replies look more natural
autoReply.voiceDesc: Your responses will automatically reflect your established brand personality and values across all platforms.
